name: Example Developer Requirements
description: Example rules that turn detected troubleshooter checks into app-specific launch requirements.

requirements.label: CPU virtualization must be enabled
requirements.impact: This app needs Intel VT-x or AMD-V enabled before it can launch its VM-backed runtime.
requirements.recommendation: Enable Intel VT-x or AMD-V in BIOS/UEFI, then run the troubleshooter again.

requirements.label: VBS must be running
requirements.impact: This app expects Windows virtualization-based security to be active.

requirements.label: Hyper-V must be disabled
requirements.impact: Some anti-cheat or driver stacks require Hyper-V to be off. This example intentionally accepts the default disabled warning state.
requirements.recommendation: Disable Hyper-V if this application cannot run while the Windows hypervisor is enabled.
